data.text:
These tears are not weakness… they are the weight of very hard days.
Today I was cooking over a small fire just to feed my family, because we barely have any food left.
The war has taken everything from us, and all we have now is hope in kind hearts.

data.text:
Amidst the conflict and crisis across the world right now, we can’t forget the people, and especially children, of Gaza, where over a million children are in crisis.

It is a humanitarian emergency that especially puts girls at risk. We cannot stay silent. Call your lawmakers.

data.text: Good morning, I’m reaching out with a heavy heart. It has been several days without any donations, and we are in urgent need of help. Every small contribution can make a big difference for us. Please consider donating or sharing our story.
